#{"id":"ct-1774299658575-4","messages":[{"content":"The exec call returned the string "Handled mention". This means the exec code successfully run and posted to the channel. Now we need to dismiss the inbox message #1, and then reply to it.

We should use dismiss tool with messageNumber=1. Then reply to message #1 with some text.

The guidelines: always dismiss messages after handling them. Also reply to acknowledge privately.

Thus next step: call dismiss with messageNumber=1.

After dismiss, we need to send a reply. Use reply tool with messageNumber=1, strings=["Thanks for the mention!"], no edgeNames or petNames needed.

One at a time.

Thus call dismiss.


</think>","role":"assistant","tool_calls":[{"function":{"arguments":"{"messageNumber":1}","name":"dismiss"},"id":"tool_1774299658572_0","type":"function"}]},{"content":"!"Dismissed message #1"","role":"tool","tool_call_id":"tool_1774299658572_0"}],"metadata":{},"parentId":"ct-1774299656536-3","timestamp":1774299658575}
